title: Squid Pearl Games
description: Adds Squid Game content to Minecraft: voting system & machine, Jump rope game dolls (Young-hee, Cheol-soo), Red Light Green Light Doll, VIP masks, uniforms, frontman outfit, beds, and more for an authentic Squid Game experience.
body:
This mod adds many things in the squid game, such as: voting machine, dolls in the rope jumping game(young hee, cheol soo), dolls in the green light red light game, voting system, vip masks, soldier and player clothes, frontman clothes, beds, and many more.

 

-Commands-

 

/voteresult : Shows the voting result.

/voteoverlay : Shows voting progress on players' screen.

/voteoverlayclose : Turns off the voting progress on screen.

/votereset : resets the voting status, sets x and o votes to 0, and the voting starts again

/votedecrease x/o 1 : Decreases x or o by the desired number of votes

 

 

3D models by: Leia, Wexde
